languages.text: "Я знаю, старый друг. Я пришел тебя отпустить. {name}, Вольный Торговец, дал мне шанс это сделать".
"I know, old friend. I've come to release you. {name}, Rogue Trader, has given me the chance to do this."
languages.original_text: "Я знаю, старый друг. Я пришел тебя отпустить. {name}, Вольный Торговец, дал мне шанс это сделать".

traits.locale_text: "I know, old friend. I've come to release you. {name}, Rogue Trader, has given me the chance to do this."
"I know, old friend. I've come to release you. {name}, Rogue Trader, has given me the chance to do this."
"I know, old friend. I've come to release you. {name}, Rogue Trader, has given me the chance to do this."

languages.text: «Lo sé, viejo amigo. He venido para liberarte. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente {name} me ha brindado la oportunidad de hacerlo».
languages.original_text: "I know, old friend. I've come to release you. {name}, Rogue Trader, has given me the chance to do this."

traits.locale_text: «Lo sé, viejo amigo. He venido para liberarte. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente {name} me ha brindado la oportunidad de hacerlo».

languages.text: “我知道，老朋友。我来让你解脱了。是{name}，那位行商浪人，给了我这个机会。”
languages.original_text: "I know, old friend. I've come to release you. {name}, Rogue Trader, has given me the chance to do this."

traits.locale_text: “我知道，老朋友。我来让你解脱了。是{name}，那位行商浪人，给了我这个机会。”

languages.text: « Je sais, mon vieil ami. Je suis venu te délivrer. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} {name} von Valancius m'en a donné la possibilité. »
languages.original_text: "I know, old friend. I've come to release you. {name}, Rogue Trader, has given me the chance to do this."

traits.locale_text: « Je sais, mon vieil ami. Je suis venu te délivrer. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} {name} von Valancius m'en a donné la possibilité. »

languages.text: "Biliyorum eski dostum. Seni özgür bırakmaya geldim. Hür Tacir bana bu fırsatı sundu."
languages.original_text: "I know, old friend. I've come to release you. {name}, Rogue Trader, has given me the chance to do this."

traits.locale_text: "Biliyorum eski dostum. Seni özgür bırakmaya geldim. Hür Tacir bana bu fırsatı sundu."

languages.text: "Ich weiß, alter Freund. Ich bin gekommen, um Euch zu befreien. {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} {name} gab mir die Chance dazu."
languages.original_text: "I know, old friend. I've come to release you. {name}, Rogue Trader, has given me the chance to do this."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß, alter Freund. Ich bin gekommen, um Euch zu befreien. {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} {name} gab mir die Chance dazu."

languages.text: 「分かっている、古き友よ。私はあなたを解放するために来た。{name}、ローグトレーダーが、私にこれをなす機会を与えてくれたのです」
languages.original_text: "I know, old friend. I've come to release you. {name}, Rogue Trader, has given me the chance to do this."

traits.locale_text: 「分かっている、古き友よ。私はあなたを解放するために来た。{name}、ローグトレーダーが、私にこれをなす機会を与えてくれたのです」
